description: Create a residential deck framing plan in LibreCAD and save it as a DXF file at /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/deck_framing_plan.dxf. The drawing (units in inches) must include a 144x192 unit deck outline starting at (0,0) on layer 'OUTLINE', a ledger board (double or thick line) at the top edge (Y=192) on layer 'LEDGER', a beam line across the full width at Y=96 on layer 'BEAM', and vertical joist lines from Y=0 to 192 spaced 16 units on-center starting from X=0 on layer 'JOISTS'. The plan also requires three post markers under the beam at X=0, 72, and 144 on layer 'POSTS', a 36x48 unit stair rectangle centered on the bottom edge (X=54 to 90, Y=-48 to 0) on layer 'STAIRS', and dimensions for overall width, length, and joist spacing on layer
